rationale: Foreign entity's name as it appears on the SOS record. Foreign-form convention per LLC_MLLC-12 / CORP_FICT-4.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The old home office address as it appears on the record in the Secretary of State's office (street, city, state and zip code - old address)
rationale: Single-line old home-office address on file with SOS prior to the municipal/USPS change.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The new home office address (physical location, not P.O. Box - street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: New physical street address — explicitly excludes P.O. boxes per label.
Optional mailing address when distinct from the new physical location.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The jurisdiction of organization/incorporation is
rationale: State or country of formation. Existing key (LLC_MLLC-12, CORP_FICT-4).

label_verbatim: and the date on which the entity was authorized to transact business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Date the foreign entity qualified in Maine. Existing key (CORP_CLKRA-3).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ... duly authorized by (choose one): Town/Municipality
rationale: FOURTH-section selection box for the 'Town/Municipality' option. Despite its visual checkbox appearance, this widget is /Tx (free text) — the signer marks it (e.g., 'X') or types the municipality name. Mutually exclusive with Text8.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ... duly authorized by (choose one): U.S. Postal Service
rationale: FOURTH-section selection box for the 'U.S. Postal Service' option. Same /Tx-as-checkbox quirk as Text7. Mutually exclusive with Text7.
Date the cover-page signature block was executed (left of the **By signature row).
Shape D — printed name + capacity combined in one widget. Capacity is constrained by footnote 2 to 'municipal official' or 'postmaster'.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 — first entity in the submitted-filings bundle.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier = 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier = '24h_next_business_day' ($50/entity).
Expedite tier = 'immediate_same_day' ($100/entity).
Form header notes 'No Filing Fee' for the body filing itself; this widget captures only the optional expedite fee.
Filing-question contact.
Daytime phone for contact.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Per-filing contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Persistent recurring-reminder email tied to the entity (separate from per-filing contact email).
Recipient of the attested copy of the completed filing.
Recipient firm/company.
Recipient street/PO box.
